title: GPE Results Report 2024 - Learning Crisis Response
description: Global Partnership for Education released comprehensive results highlighting work to address acute learning poverty affecting over 80% of children in West and Central Africa.

title: Rwanda Quality Basic Education Project Milestone
description: World Bank implementation progress report shows 13 model schools, 11,000 classrooms, and 621 resilience upgrades under the Quality Basic Education for Human Capital Development Project.

title: Unstoppable Africa Summit 2024
description: Global Africa Business Initiative flagship event attracted over 2,000 leaders themed 'Shaping Global Ambitions for Agenda 2063' alongside UN General Assembly.

title: International Literacy Day 2024 Global Celebration
description: Over 500 government representatives, development partners, experts, and educators gathered to enhance literacy policies and lifelong learning systems.

title: AU Continental Teacher Prize Program Launch
description: Teacher development positioned as first strategic objective of CESA 16-25, recognizing teachers as prime movers in Agenda 2063 education revolution.

title: GPE 2024 Factsheet - Key Achievements
description: New countries joined partnership, millions of children reached and teachers trained, significant financing granted for education transformation.

title: AU Multilingual Education Platform Launch
description: Pan-African Conference on Teacher Education launched platform supporting 6 African Union languages for teacher development.
